meta.title: Reclaiming the Moral Life of Philanthropy?
meta.description: Delivering an address entitled "Reclaiming the Moral Life of Philanthropy" at MIT in September 2010, Atlantic Philanthropies president Gara LaMarche noted that he felt:         a disquiet about the way we in the foundation world, along with the organisations we support and the infrastructure many of us have helped to build, have mirrored trends in the political world to talk about what we do and why we are doing it in ways that have strayed too far from first principles. We have become more abou
